author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 47067f48. decompose_forward_backward now emits real backward IR nodes for Add/Sub/Mul/Neg/Relu/Sum/Mean. Walks the forward graph in reverse topological order, propagating grad through a HashMap<IrValueId, IrValueId>, with accumulate_grad emitting Add nodes when a forward value is consumed by multiple ops. Backward graph layout: [saved_0, ..., saved_{k-1}, grad_output] inputs, one grad output per forward input (zero Constant fallback for unused inputs). 9 new tests; 278 ferrotorch-jit tests pass.
